title: qPCR cytokines upon treatment
author: Pedro Hernandez
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Raw data (Ct values) of qPCR performed on zebrafish rag1+/+ (wt) and rag1-/- (mutant) intestines dissected 6 hours after i.p. injection with PBS, Vibrio anguillarum or Anisakis simplex extract.
